Overview
Specifications

EPYC™ Server Products

Whether you deploy bare metal, virtualized, or in the cloud, the AMD EPYC processor powers fast, responsive, and secure IT.

EPYC™ Embedded Products

Provides customers with the Performance, Dependability and Security as well as the longevity that Embedded customers demand.

Overview

EPYC™ Server Products

Whether you deploy bare metal, virtualized, or in the cloud, the AMD EPYC processor powers fast, responsive, and secure IT.

EPYC™ Embedded Products

Provides customers with the Performance, Dependability and Security as well as the longevity that Embedded customers demand.
